title: Brewing XP
description: Gives you experience orbs from brewing potions, like you would from smelting
body:
If fishing can give you XP, smelting can give you XP, mining can give you XP..
Then it only makes sense that brewing can give you XP.

When you brew a potion and manually take it out of the brewing stand (no hopper), you will now gain 5 XP points per potion
